remarks.name: Tigera Blog (Calico / AI Security)
remarks.role: AI agent governance, security, accountability frameworks, enterprise AI deployment policy.
remarks.text: Why We Built Lynx: Bringing Control to the Age of AI Agents
remarks.content: For a decade, one idea has guided everything we’ve built at Tigera: How do you secure a dynamic system with a lot of moving parts that is changing rapidly, with a programmatic approach? Calico has... The post Why We Built Lynx: Bringing Control to the Age of AI Agents appeared first on Tigera
remarks.contentTranslation: 十年来，一个想法指导了我们在Tigera构建的一切：如何通过编程方法来确保一个具有许多快速变化的移动部件的动态系统？ Calico有...我们为什么要建造Lynx ：将控制权带入AI时代的文章首次出现在Tigera上

remarks.name: Dataiku Blog
remarks.role: AI governance, enterprise AI platform deployment, MLOps, analytics, agent orchestration.
remarks.text: Governance as acceleration: data proves it’s not a speed bump
remarks.content: For years, the enterprise AI governance conversation has been shaped by a quiet assumption: Governance is the thing that slows AI down. This may look like the review cycle that delays the launch, committee that questions the model, or even documentation requirement that sits between a wo
remarks.contentTranslation: 多年来，企业AI治理对话一直被一个安静的假设所塑造：治理是减缓AI的因素。这可能看起来像延迟发布的审核周期、质疑模型的委员会，甚至是WO之间的文档要求
remarks.translation: 治理作为加速：数据证明它不是减速带
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Dataiku Blog
remarks.role: AI governance, enterprise AI platform deployment, MLOps, analytics, agent orchestration.
remarks.text: Generative AI governance framework: building responsible AI systems
remarks.content: Generative AI is no longer a pilot that leaders can observe from a distance. It is in contact centers, developer workflows, reporting layers, and autonomous agents acting on behalf of the business. As BARC's research on modernizing governance for the era of agentic AI shows, the stakes r
remarks.contentTranslation: 生成式AI不再是领导者可以远距离观察的试点。它存在于联系中心、开发人员工作流、报告层和代表业务行事的自主Agent中。正如BARC关于智能AI时代治理现代化的研究所表明的那样，
remarks.translation: 生成式AI治理框架：构建负责任的AI系统

remarks.name: Dataiku Blog
remarks.role: AI governance, enterprise AI platform deployment, MLOps, analytics, agent orchestration.
remarks.text: Sovereignty isn't where your AI runs. It's whether it answers to you.
remarks.content: Last week, a government order took the world's best AI model offline in hours. No one deleted it and no server failed. A single directive put the most capable model on the market out of reach for everyone not a citizen of one country.
remarks.contentTranslation: 上周，一项政府命令在数小时内让世界上最好的AI模型下线。没有人将其删除，也没有服务器发生故障。单一指令使市场上最有能力的模型对每个人不是一个国家的公民来说都是遥不可及的。
remarks.translation: 主权并不是你的AI运行的地方。问题在于它是否对你有所回应。

remarks.name: Dataiku Blog
remarks.role: AI governance, enterprise AI platform deployment, MLOps, analytics, agent orchestration.
remarks.text: What is an AI orchestration layer? Architecture, benefits, and enterprise use cases
remarks.content: AI investments are multiplying, but coordination between models, agents, and data pipelines remains an afterthought in most enterprises. The result is predictable: duplicated workflows, inconsistent outputs, ungoverned decisions, and AI initiatives that never graduate from pilot to produ
remarks.contentTranslation: AI投资正在成倍增加，但在大多数企业中，模型、Agent和数据管道之间的协调仍然是事后的想法。结果是可预测的：重复的工作流、不一致的输出、不受控制的决策以及从试点到生产的AI计划
remarks.translation: 什么是AI编排层？架构、优势和企业用例
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Dataiku Blog
remarks.role: AI governance, enterprise AI platform deployment, MLOps, analytics, agent orchestration.
remarks.text: AI explainability in enterprise AI: methods, tools, and why it matters for trustworthy models and agents
remarks.content: AI models, generative AI (GenAI) applications, and agents are making decisions that affect credit scores, patient care, and hiring outcomes. Enterprises deploying these systems are accumulating regulatory and reputational risk proportional to the number of decisions that cannot be explai
remarks.contentTranslation: AI模型、生成式AI(GenAI)应用程序和Agent商正在做出影响信用评分、患者护理和招聘结果的决策。部署这些系统的企业正在积累与无法解释的决策数量成比例的监管和声誉风险
remarks.translation: 企业AI中的AI可解释性：方法、工具及其对可信模型和Agent的重要性
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.name: Dataiku Blog
remarks.role: AI governance, enterprise AI platform deployment, MLOps, analytics, agent orchestration.
remarks.text: How enterprise analytics platforms are evolving: from dashboards to AI-driven decisions
remarks.content: The enterprise analytics platforms of 2023 were dashboard factories. The ones built for 2026 are decision engines where AI agents, machine learning (ML) models, and business rules operate alongside traditional reporting. But many enterprises still cannot route model outputs into decision
remarks.contentTranslation: 2023年的企业分析平台是仪表板工厂。为2026年构建的决策引擎是AIAgent、机器学习(ML)模型和业务规则与传统报告一起运行的决策引擎。但许多企业仍然无法将模型输出转化为决策
remarks.translation: 企业分析平台如何发展：从仪表板到AI驱动的决策

remarks.content: Chinese AI lab Z.ai released GLM-5.2 to their coding plan subscribers on June 13th, and then yesterday (June 16th) released the full open weights under an MIT license. Similar in size to their previous GLM-
remarks.contentTranslation: 中国AI实验室Z.ai于6月13日向其编码计划用户发布了GLM-5.2 ，然后于昨天（ 6月16日）在麻省理工学院许可证下发布了完整的开放权重。与他们之前的GLM尺寸相似
remarks.translation: GLM-5.2可能是最强大的纯文本开放式权重LLM

remarks.name: Garry Tan
remarks.role: President & CEO ycombinator —Founder garryslist—Creator of GStack & GBrain—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop
remarks.text:
Which leads to… Bowen’s differentiation of self

Low differentiation = highly reactive to others' emotional cues, loses self in relationships, can't hold boundaries under pressure — collapses into "we-ness" (everyone must feel the same or the bond feels threatened).

Two flavors of the same disease: chameleons (adjust themselves to please, fusion mode) and bullies (force others to conform, the asshole mode). Both are undifferentiated. The self-abandoner and the asshole are the same person.

The fix is the same: lower the chronic anxiety, raise the capacity to stay a separate self in contact.
remarks.translation:
这导致...... Bowen对自我的分化低分化=对他人的情感线索高度反应，在人际关系中失去自我，无法在压力下保持界限—崩溃成“我们” （每个人都必须有同样的感觉，否则债券会感到受到威胁）。同一种疾病的两种口味：变色龙（根据需要调整自己，融合模式）和恶霸（强迫他人遵守，混蛋模式）。两者都是未分化的。
自我放弃者和混蛋是同一个人。解决办法是相同的：降低慢性焦虑，提高保持独立自我接触的能力。
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Madhu Guru
remarks.role: Prev: Product Leader at Google - Gemini, Veo, Nano Banana.
remarks.text:
over the last century, we’ve treated the intellect as a defining human trait and under-invested   in other aspects that make us uniquely human, such as self-awareness, intuition, compassion and kindness. 

the next few years will force us to rethink this. https://t.co/4iE3kAMauP
remarks.translation: 在过去的一个世纪里，我们将智力视为一种定义性的人类特质，并未充分投资于使我们成为独一无二的人类的其他方面，例如自我意识、直觉、同情心和善良。未来几年将迫使我们重新思考这一点。
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Aaron Levie
remarks.role: ceo box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI
remarks.text:
One of the biggest questions in AI is how far behind open weights models remain from closed models at any given time. There are huge differences in market structures depending on whether open weights models remain 3 or 6 months behind, or if they fall behind by years. 

The answer to this will determine how the chip stack plays out, where inference can be run, what sovereign AI looks like, what happens at the applied AI layer, what the margin structure looks like in AI, how much companies can afford to spend on AI, and more.

At the moment the open weights players appear to be holding up at keeping close to frontier levels of capability. Will be fun to see how this plays out.
remarks.translation:
AI最大的问题之一是，在任何给定时间，开放权重模型与封闭模型之间的差距有多大。市场结构存在巨大差异，这取决于开放权重模型是否仍然落后3个月或6个月，或者它们是否落后多年。
答案将决定芯片堆栈如何发挥作用，在哪里可以运行推理，主权AI是什么样子，应用AI层会发生什么，AI中的利润率结构是什么样子，公司可以在AI上花多少钱等等。目前，开放式举重球员似乎坚持保持接近前沿水平的能力。看看这是如何发挥作用的，一定会很有趣。
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察模型运行、算力、存储、sandbox 或开发平台基础设施的变化；后续事实判断需回到原始公告或技术文档。

remarks.text:
🇧🇷World-changing AI companies are coming from Brazil.

That’s why we’ve officially expanded our Google AI Futures Fund to Brazil, partnering with venture capital leader Monashees to launch the Gama Fund.

We’re looking for an elite cohort of deep tech founders and will offer:

- Early access to Google DeepMind models
- Up to $2M in co-investment
- $350k in Google Cloud & Gemini credits
- Direct co-development with Google engineers at our new IPT Open campus hub

Apply today: https://t.co/8sv9seJLdB
remarks.translation:
🇧🇷改变世界的AI公司来自巴西。这就是为什么我们正式将Google AI Futures Fund扩展到巴西，与风险投资领导者Monashees合作推出GAMA基金。
我们正在寻找一支由深度技术创始人组成的精英团队，他们将提供： -抢先体验Google DeepMind模型-高达200万美元的共同投资- 35万美元的Google Cloud和Gemini积分-在我们新的IPT Open园区中心与Google工程师直接共同开发立即申请：

remarks.text:
You don’t have to chase the cool thing. Do whatever you’re already doing so well that it becomes the cool thing.

The cool thing is rarely cool when it starts. It becomes cool because someone went deep on something everyone else thought was too small.

remarks.name: Zara Zhang
remarks.role: Builder. Dangerously skips permissions. Harvard’17. GitHub: https://t.co/KCuEajezlL YouTube: https://t.co/8xzbGWtf6w
remarks.text:
Every other product right now is "an AI agent that does everything in your work & life & integrates with everything." 

Cool, that's just Claude/Codex. 

If you want me to use your thing instead, it needs an opinion & a soul. Build small & sharp, not big & generic.

Doing everything means doing nothing. Speaking to everybody means speaking to nobody.
remarks.translation: 现在所有其他产品都是“一个AIAgent，可以完成您工作和生活中的所有事情，并与所有事情相结合。“太棒了，那只是Claude/Codex。如果你想让我使用你的东西，它需要一个意见和一个灵魂。构建小而敏锐，而不是大而通用。什么都做就意味着什么都不做。与每个人交谈意味着不与任何人交谈。
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.name: Madhu Guru
remarks.role: Prev: Product Leader at Google - Gemini, Veo, Nano Banana.
remarks.text:
The real prize in the SpaceX-Cursor deal is the agentic harness that will become the core for automating all knowledge work at scale.

Here’s what SpaceX is getting:

1. Production-grade agentic harness  -planning, context management, tool use, iteration, verification, memory, error recovery. 
Any product experience can be completely redesigned in an AI-native way with this harness.

2. Expertise on the full AI stack - model, evals, harness, application layer.

3. End to end product lifecycle focus: product strategy -> user journeys -> GTM. Everything optimized for one job: helping software engineers build.

Very few companies do even one of these well. Cursor brings all three.
remarks.translation:
SpaceX-Cursor交易的真正好处是Agent线束，它将成为大规模自动化所有知识工作的核心。以下是SpaceX将获得的内容： 1.生产级Agent线束-规划、上下文管理、工具使用、迭代、验证、内存、错误恢复。任何产品体验都可以使用此线束以AI原生的方式完全重新设计。2.全AI堆栈方面的专业知识-模型、EVALS、线束、应用层。3.
端到端产品生命周期重点：产品战略- >用户旅程- > GTM。一切都针对一项工作进行了优化：帮助软件工程师构建。很少有公司能做得很好。光标带来了所有三个。
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 AI 编程工具、设计到代码流程和软件生产方式的变化；需要结合产品发布或文档再做事实判断。

remarks.name: Aaron Levie
remarks.role: ceo box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI
remarks.text:
The Cursor deal is symbolically quite significant. It was effectively the first mega success in the applied layer of AI. 

They firmly proved out the value proposition of having a deep domain focus, the role you play as a model router, when to lean into frontier models vs. when to train your own, and the role of applied AI GTM and distribution to make sure you’re actually taking advantage of the market opportunity. 

Every aspect of their business was tuned to carve out ground and keep doubling down in a highly competitive space. This is really the first at scale template for how to execute this playbook.
remarks.translation:
光标交易具有象征意义。这实际上是AI应用层的第一个巨大成功。他们坚定地证明了深入关注领域的价值主张，您作为模型路由器所扮演的角色，何时学习前沿模型，何时培训自己的模型，以及应用AI GTM和分销的作用，以确保您真正利用市场机会。
他们业务的每个方面都经过调整，以便在竞争激烈的空间中开拓并保持双倍增长。这实际上是第一个关于如何执行此攻略的大规模模板。
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 AI 编程工具、设计到代码流程和软件生产方式的变化；需要结合产品发布或文档再做事实判断。

remarks.text: Claude Fable is relentlessly proactive
